tools.name: generate_ai_readiness_files
tools.description: Start generating the 18 AI Readiness Kit files for a website. Returns the full workflow for the connected agent to execute (research, classify, write files).

tools.name: list_output_files
tools.description: List all 18 AI readiness files in generation order with filenames and purposes

tools.name: get_file_spec
tools.description: Get the detailed specification for one AI readiness output file (e.g. llms.txt, ai-entities.json)

tools.name: get_skill_instructions
tools.description: Return the full AI Readiness skill workflow (research, classification, file generation)

tools.name: get_site_classification_guide
tools.description: Return the site-type classification table used before generating files

tools.name: generate_rag_jsonl
tools.description: Convert rag-index.json content (JSON array) to rag-index.jsonl (one JSON object per line)
